title: Modify unsecure Kerberos delegations to prevent impersonation
remediation:
1. Review this security control list of exposed entities to discover which of your non-domain controller entities are configured for unsecure Kerberos delegation.
2. Take appropriate action on those at-risk users, such as removing their unconstrained attribute or changing it to a more secure constrained delegation.
To achieve a full score, you must remediate all exposed entities.
remediationImpact: A user or an application that relies on these types of unsecure kerberos configurations may stop functioning.
